heading: Dissemination project
label: 285e–8 Dissemination project
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 11282 of this titlePub. L. 100–607

Amendments1988—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(a)section 11282 of this titleSubsecs. (a), (d). , substituted “the Institute” for “the National Institute on Aging”.Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(d)(5)
amendments: Amendments1988—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(a)section 11282 of this titleSubsecs. (a), (d). , substituted “the Institute” for “the National Institute on Aging”.Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(d)(5)

children.heading: Grant or contract for establishment
children.label: a Grant or contract for establishment
children.text: The Director of the Institute shall make a grant to, or enter into a contract with, a national organization representing individuals with Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias for the conduct of the activities described in subsection (b).

children.label: A
children.text: compile and disseminate information concerning initiatives by State and local governments and private entities to provide programs and services for individuals with Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias; and

children.label: B
children.text: translate scientific and technical information concerning such initiatives into information readily understandable by the general public, and make such information available upon request; and

establish a national toll-free telephone line to make available the information described in paragraph (1), and information concerning Federal programs, services, and benefits for individuals with Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias and their families.

children.heading: Fees for information; exception
children.label: c Fees for information; exception
children.text: The organization receiving a grant or contract under this section may charge appropriate fees for information provided through the toll-free telephone line established under subsection (b)(2), and may make exceptions to such fees for individuals and organizations who are not financially able to pay such fees.

children.heading: Application for grant or contract; contents
children.label: d Application for grant or contract; contents

children.text: information demonstrating that such organization has a network of contacts which will enable such organization to receive information necessary to the operation of the central computerized information system described in subsection (b)(1);

information demonstrating that, by the end of fiscal year 1991, such organization will be financially able to, and will, carry out the activities described in subsection (b) without a grant or contract from the Federal Government; and
such other information as the Director may prescribe.
